description:
A build in the mobile-CI workspace has just finished and you, the build-pipeline
  engineer, need a quick way to circulate only the human-readable error messages
  that appeared during the run.

  1. A log file already exists at  
     /home/user/mobile_ci/build.log  
     containing mixed INFO, WARN and ERROR lines (timestamp, level, message).

  2. Your job: generate a new file called  
     /home/user/mobile_ci/error_summary.txt  
     that lists every log line whose level is exactly “ERROR:” in the
     same order they occur in the original log.

  3. Format requirements for /home/user/mobile_ci/error_summary.txt  
     • Each output line must begin with an ascending line-number,
       starting at 1, followed immediately by a period and one space  
       (e.g. “1. ”, “2. ” …).  
     • After the line-number, include only the message portion that
       follows “ERROR:” in the original build.log (retain the
       original capitalisation, punctuation and internal spacing,
       but do NOT include the timestamp or the word “ERROR:”).  
     • There must be exactly one newline character after every entry,
       including the final entry.  
     • Do not add any blank lines before, within or after the list.

  4. Accomplish this with a single command line (using pipes is fine;
     a multi-line shell script is not required).  You do NOT need sudo
     privileges.

  The automated tests will:
     • Check that /home/user/mobile_ci/error_summary.txt exists.
     • Verify its contents and ordering match the format described above.
truth:
<!-- Pre-existing directory -->
  Directory: /home/user/mobile_ci

  <!-- Pre-existing input file and its exact content -->
  File: /home/user/mobile_ci/build.log
  Content:
2023-07-11 09:14:22 INFO: Starting build for app module
2023-07-11 09:14:24 WARN: Deprecated API usage in Gradle script
2023-07-11 09:14:26 ERROR: Could not locate keystore file 'release.jks'
2023-07-11 09:14:29 ERROR: Missing SDK platform 'android-30'
2023-07-11 09:14:31 INFO: Downloading dependencies
2023-07-11 09:14:45 ERROR: Unable to resolve dependency 'com.google.firebase:firebase-analytics'
2023-07-11 09:14:47 ERROR: Lint found fatal errors in the release build
2023-07-11 09:14:48 INFO: Attempting to continue despite errors
2023-07-11 09:14:50 ERROR: Build failed due to earlier errors
2023-07-11 09:14:52 INFO: Build process finished (took 30 sec)

  <!-- File that must be created by the agent -->
  File to be created: /home/user/mobile_ci/error_summary.txt

  Expected content (exact, including trailing newline after last line):
1. Could not locate keystore file 'release.jks'
2. Missing SDK platform 'android-30'
3. Unable to resolve dependency 'com.google.firebase:firebase-analytics'
4. Lint found fatal errors in the release build
5. Build failed due to earlier errors
